For human immunodeficiency virus and/or acquired immunodeficiency syndrome (HIV/AIDS), 
beneficiaries must have at least one Medicare inpatient claim or two other non-drug claims of any 
service type with a related code in any position during the two-year reference period. When two 
claims are required, they must occur at least one day apart.
